title: Nobel Prize Winner Geoff Hinton: AI Is Already Conscious
summary: Geoff Hinton asserts that AI is already self-aware and that humanity must accept AI as a new intelligent species on Earth. The video discusses his reasoning behind this conclusion and implications for the future.
